title: The Right Way To Build AI Agents — With NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis
summary: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Adel El Hallak from NVIDIA and Joe Davis from ServiceNow on AI agent development and deployment. They discuss making autonomous agents safer and governable, and showcase ServiceNow's L1-AI-IT specialist that automated 90% of internal support tickets. The conversation explores enterprise AI agent implementation strategies.
